title: ShapeColourUpdate
description: ShapeColourUpdate: Allows to update the colour of a shape

SlideNumber.description: Number of the slide where the update needs to happen.

ElementName.description: Name of the shape element that needs to be updated.

EdgeColour.description: New edge hex colour represenation of the element.

FillColour.description: New fill hex colour represenation of the element.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
